channel.title: Ghadah Alabduljabbar on SBMARUF
channel.description: Recent content in Ghadah Alabduljabbar on SBMARUF

item.title: ALLaM: Large Language Models for Arabic and English
item.description: A sovereign bilingual LLM for Arabic and English, achieving state-of-the-art Arabic performance, integrated into IBM Watsonx and Microsoft Azure.
